//: Copy to tetra.config.json and edit. Every stage's agent is swappable — tetra never forces one pattern.
//skills: Vetted, first-party rubrics injected into a stage's prompt when it fires them. Bundled defaults (code-review, testing-strategy) come with tetra; add your own by pointing at a markdown file (path relative to this repo).
//example-swap: Want Claude to write and AGY to review? Just change the 'use' values below.
